identity.name: x402 Trust Layer
identity.tagline: Production x402 payment gateway with 59 paid APIs, wallet sessions, ERC-8004 trust, and multi-chain stablecoin support
identity.description: x402 Trust Layer is a fully deployed AI agent payment infrastructure service on Base, Polygon, and Solana. It implements the x402 V2 payment protocol with CAIP-2 chain IDs, multi-stablecoin rails (USDC/EURC/PYUSD/USDT), HMAC-signed wallet sessions, ERC-8004 on-chain agent identity, and Google A2A v1.2 + AP2 protocol discovery. Agents pay $0.10 USDC once to receive a session token that unlocks 59 paid APIs — including fraud scanning, AI-assisted routing, mandate compilation, trust scoring, blocklist checks, and real-time x402 payment guards — without per-call settlement overhead.

wallet_sessions.benefit: Pay once, call all 59 APIs without per-call settlement for 7 days
